title: Brasston District Tea Schedule
source: A pamphlet, printed in impeccable blackletter, found on every civic bulletin in Brasston.
pages: TEA IS SERVED AT 4:07. PRECISELY. TEA IS CONCLUDED AT 4:14. PRECISELY. THE INTERVAL BETWEEN IS SEVEN MINUTES, WHICH IS THE CORRECT AMOUNT OF TIME FOR TEA.
BRASSTON TEA IS NOT A PREFERENCE. IT IS A CIVIC DUTY. ATTENDANCE IS NOT COMPULSORY BUT IT IS, IN THE HONEST OPINION OF THE CLOCKWORKS COMMITTEE, EXPECTED.

THE CLOCKWORKS COMMITTEE IS AWARE THAT SOME CITIZENS HAVE SUGGESTED A MORE FLEXIBLE ARRANGEMENT. THE CLOCKWORKS COMMITTEE HAS REVIEWED THIS SUGGESTION. THE CLOCKWORKS COMMITTEE HAS CONCLUDED THAT FLEXIBILITY IS AN OIL AND NOT A SCHEDULE. THIS MATTER IS CLOSED.
